raw_consumer_statement: XXXX XX/XX/XXXX  at XXXXXXXX XXXX in XXXX XXXX ( XXXX ) we took a taxi and verbally agreed to pay {$15.00} for the closest hotel which is 10 minutes ' drive. They said they don't accept cash, so we provided a credit card. They didn't give us any receipts. After returning home I discovered that the charge was {$320.00}. I opened a dispute with the credit card company. Dispute was resolved in favor of the merchant based on the documentation they provided. The merchant stated that the card was present at the time of transaction, and that the charge was duly accepted and signed. I've never accepted and signed this overcharged amount.
